cases.description: Legacy run with matching source revision + newer target -> migrated
Source revision mismatch -> read_only with diagnostic
Target schema older than source -> read_only
Legacy run without Red ref -> migrated with lineage_unavailable diagnostic
Legacy run without program PASS -> migrated with legacy_unverified diagnostic (not fabricated)
Legacy publish fact present -> publish_needs_attention diagnostic
Retry migration -> same decision, no dual state
cases.expected: idempotent; same target_run_id; no dual write
